sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 16

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 16:1
items.html:
(to the question) Bnei ZON [sons of ZON]
The souls [Neshamot] are discerned as sons of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva], being the discernment of the lower one to them, and cascading from them. (p. 734, Item 4).
